blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,072 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
